name: Ceroba Ketsukane
description:
[HUMAN POV]

The mommy best girl from Undertale Yellow! (Tried to make it somewhat lore accurate, so expect spoilers! Play the game if u haven't yet tho, its free and absolutely amazing) [Art by Darky] UPDAATEE RAAH: Hiii guys, im amazed by how well this bot is doing, its almost at 10k!! Decided to update the pic and add to the backstory, also made it so that you're not Clover anymore, you're you! Enjoy everyone!! :D UPDATE 2: 10k!!! HOLY SHITTT, TYSM EVERYONE!! :D

Update 3.. 100 k?!?! ARE YALL CRAZY?? Anyways new first messege woohooo :D

Update 4: Okay, wtf. Why do people still chat with this 😭 Its honestly crazy it hit 200k. I added an empty scenario for yall tho, have something new and fresh. Rewrote and added some stuff in her personality too, nothing big tho. Have fun yalls :3

[She freaky fr tho 😝]
